title: PTD Mourns Enugu Tanker Explosion Victims, Pleads For Rehabilitation Of Bad Roads, Stakeholders Engagement - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has expressed sadness over the tragic tanker explosion at the Ugwu-Onyeama axis of the Enugu-Onitsha Expressway that claimed lives. It would be recalled that the incident happened Saturday morning, January 25, 2025 around 11:30 a.m. when a fuel-laden
html: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has expressed sadness over the tragic tanker explosion at the Ugwu-Onyeama axis of the Enugu-Onitsha Expressway that claimed lives.
